concerns.text: Constitution Check table claims Principle V (Fail Fast) PASS, but reviewer comments confirm tests/ directory is completely missing. Contract tests cannot run without test files. This is a false compliance claim.
Constitution Check Principle II claims all sources documented with verified URLs, but research.md explicitly states SoilGrids has 'No verified source available'. This contradicts the PASS status.
contracts/farm_survey.schema.yaml exists but is not referenced in plan.md Project Structure or contracts/ section. Plan should document all contract files that exist in contracts/.

farm_survey.schema.yaml uses 'farmer_id' and 'region_code' identifiers, but data-model.md defines 'household_id' and 'region'. Contract and data model use different naming conventions for the same entities.

Plan specifies 5 rural pilot regions as scale, but data-model has no pilot_region metadata table. Plan step '5 rural pilot regions' cannot be tracked via existing entities (household.region is VARCHAR(50) without pilot designation).
